mapper.select: select * from sys_user where username = #{username} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user(username, password, nickname, avatar, phone, email, gender, age, role, status, balance, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{role}, #{status}, #{balance}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update sys_user set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_user where role = #{role}
